overall.description: First-person perspective of a person walking through a dense forest at night using a flashlight. The footage captures the narrow trail, tall trees, and thick undergrowth illuminated by the warm light as the camera holder navigates the terrain.

events.description: left hand reaches out to touch and steady against a tree trunk while walking
left hand reaches out to touch another tree trunk for support

agents.ego_description: walking carefully through the dark forest trail, occasionally reaching out to touch trees for balance while navigating uneven terrain

entered.detail: tall straight trunk of a pine tree illuminated by flashlight
dense green ferns lining the left side of the trail
dead tree branch lying across the forest floor
tree roots visible on the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward through a narrow, dark forest trail at night. Tall pine trees flank both sides while dense ferns and undergrowth line the path. The warm flashlight beam illuminates the immediate area, revealing rocks and roots on the uneven dirt trail. The person filming reaches out twice to steady themselves against tree trunks while walking.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a dark, claustrophobic forest trail illuminated by a single light source. It begins with a steady forward progression along a narrow dirt path, where a warm flashlight beam cuts through the night to reveal an uneven terrain of rocks and roots. As the camera advances, the view is tightly framed by towering pine trees and thick ferns that crowd the edges of the trail. The movement persists through the dense undergrowth, with the person filming occasionally reaching out to steady themselves against the rough bark of passing tree trunks.
